title: Advanced Nextbots
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3144b026d2612ac3ab40d0ff3f2e2eebe9501872.png)


Adds Nextbots from Garry' Mod!



**New Nextbots (Version 0.3.5):**

Nextbots now can break doors (Some sort of)

New nextbots:
- **Job Assignment Paper**
 
- **Driver**
 
- **Ballerina Cappuccina**

- **Bobrito Bandito**
 
- **Brr Brr Patapim**
 
- **Cappuccino Assassino**
 
- **Gramararam**
 
- **Lirili Larila**
 
- **Trippi Troppi**
  
- **Trulimero Trulichina**
  
- **Tung Tung Tung Sahur**


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hofEj97gEYs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



**Whats is Nextbot?:**
Nextbots are weird, funny, spooky png photos that chase players. And I added Nextbots to minecraft. If you're wondering what Nextbots look like, **you can take a look at the gallery!**

_**Here are Nextbots from mod:**_

**Amogus**
